highlights: Built a custom AI inbox layer that processed and organized a 3M+ email corpus into actionable categories.
Continuously filters noise, duplicates, and low-priority threads so the daily inbox surface only shows what matters.
Runs as always-on operations with Gmail API sync, classifier pipelines, and reliability jobs.
impact: Converted a 3M-email backlog into a clean, AI-managed inbox where only relevant, high-value messages stay visible.
one_liner: Custom AI inbox system that turned 3M+ emails into a clean, prioritized workflow with only must-see messages surfaced.
problem: A massive inbox volume made manual triage noisy and unsustainable, burying critical communication under low-signal email.
solution: Built a custom Gmail AI operations pipeline that classifies, de-duplicates, prioritizes, and continuously maintains inbox health.
title: Gmail AI Ops
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
